source.retrievalMethod: server-side GitHub Actions Census Data API ingestion
source.browserUse: inactive static artifact only; browser must not call Census API in v0.3.6
limitations: Estimates are survey estimates, not exact counts.
Margins of error must be retained.
Smaller populations may have greater uncertainty.
Suppressed or invalid values are not zero.
County-level values do not describe individuals.
Geographic boundary and vintage changes may affect comparisons.
Estimates from different vintages require careful comparison.
source.method: server-side generated artifact; county-equivalent sums use same ACS variables and ratio method as county metrics
